## OBIS & FAIR Data

::: {style="font-size: 20em;"}
| | What OBIS gives you |
|---|---|
| **F**indable | Your dataset joins a global, searchable index - with a DOI |
| **A**ccessible | Standard download/API access, no one-off email requests |
| **I**nteroperable | Darwin Core structure - readable by people *and* machines |
| **R**eusable | Documented metadata + a clear reuse license (e.g. CC-BY) |
:::

::: {.callout-tip}
## A real example
A [marine invasive species dataset](https://obis.org/dataset/98ea98e8-356b-4dd5-87c6-4eeb7e3cf588) from Venezuela, published July 2022, was included in **1,873 separate download requests** within 3 months — with zero extra effort from the data provider!
:::

::: {.notes}
...it's the reason people don't have to keep emailing you for your spreadsheet.
:::
